info.title: pgup
info.description: Solitons.Postgres.PgUp is a CLI tool for streamlined PostgreSQL deployments, automating tasks and ensuring consistent setups.

x-inspectra.cliParsedTitle: PgUp is a PostgreSQL migration tool using plain SQL for transaction-safe schema changes

options.name: --template
options.description: Specifies the template used to initialize the project. Default is 'basic'.

options.name: --trace-level
options.description:
Trace level
deploy <PROJECTFILE> [options]
Deploys a PostgreSQL database using the specified project file and configurations.

options.name: --host
options.description: The hostname or IP address of the PostgreSQL server. Default is 'localhost'.

options.name: --port
options.description: The hostname or IP address of the PostgreSQL server. Default is 'localhost'.

options.name: --username
options.description: The PostgreSQL user with permissions to create roles and databases.

options.name: --password
options.description: The password for the PostgreSQL user.

options.name: --maintenance-database
options.description: The maintenance database to use during the deployment process. Default is 'postgres'.

options.name: --parameters
options.description: Key-value pairs to override default parameters in the project file.

options.name: --timeout
options.description: The maximum time to retry deployment in case of transient errors. Default is '1 minute'.

options.name: --overwrite
options.description: Drops the existing database and recreates it. All data will be lost.

options.name: --force
options.description: Suppresses confirmation prompts when overwriting the database. Overrides safety checks.

arguments.name: PROJECTDIR
arguments.description: The target directory where the PgUp project files and deployment scripts will be created.

arguments.name: PROJECTFILE
arguments.description: The PgUp project file defining the database structure and deployment settings.
